name: GolfSuites Baton Rouge
about: GolfSuites Baton Rouge is an authentic, golf-centric entertainment facility that combines advanced indoor golf simulation with a social dining experience. It features the latest Trackman technology for realistic golf simulation, catering to both serious golfers and casual players seeking a fun outing. The venue offers a variety of hourly rates depending on the time of day and day of the week, along with food, drinks, and private event hosting capabilities.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses Trackman 4 technology for the most accurate golf simulation available
Combines golf with gourmet food and handcrafted cocktails for a complete entertainment experience
Offers a variety of pricing options, including discounted happy hour and weekly specials
Provides a private space for groups with suites accommodating up to 6 guests

food_and_drink.notes: Gourmet food available, including burgers, pizza, and game-day nachos
Full bar with handcrafted cocktails, beer, and wine; happy hour specials available

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual Doppler radar technology captures over 40 parameters of club and ball data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, professional-quality golf equipment and balls are provided at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers a full menu and bar with gourmet food and handcrafted cocktails.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but reservations can be made for hourly sessions in private suites.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue caters to families and is suitable for kids, offering a fun environment for all ages.
